allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\AJiaSu\\res.fvr"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\("window-main.htm"\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $html = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $lines = $html -split "`n"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match "bridge|BRIDGE|module|ajiasu|/head"\) { Write-Host "Line $\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i].Trim\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\AJiaSu\\res.fvr"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\("window-main.htm"\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $html = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $lines = $html -split "`n"; for \($i = 535; $i -lt 560 -and $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { Write-Host "Line $\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i]\)" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\AJiaSu\\res.fvr"\); foreach \($name in @\("common.js", "common-dialog.js"\)\) { $e = $zip.GetEntry\($name\); if \($e\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($e.Open\(\)\); $c = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $lines = $c -split "`n"; Write-Host "=== $name \(first 30 lines\) ==="; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30 -and $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { Write-Host "  $\($lines[$i]\)" } } }; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\AJiaSu\\res.fvr"\); $entry = $zip.GetEntry\("window-main.htm"\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $html = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $lines = $html -split "`n"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match "\\<script"\) { Write-Host "Line $\($i+1\): $\($lines[$i].Trim\(\)\)" } })
